results.name: Aussie Explorer
results.description: What’s greater than the great outdoors? This gift card. It’s made for the adventurers in our life. And it can be spent at outdoor and adventure outlets across this big brown land of ours.
results.retailersDescription: The Aussie Explorer Card can be used at outdoors retailers Australia-wide.

results.name: DIY Legend
results.description: Whether they’re a green thumb or super handy, now you can give them a hand with this gift card. They can spend it at popular hardware and reno stores and nurseries.
results.retailersDescription: The DIY Legend Card can be used at home & garden retailers Australia-wide.

results.name: Film Buff
results.description: Whether it’s superhero blockbusters or arthouse films, if the big screen is their thing, then this gift card is just what they need. Oh, and a large popcorn.
results.retailersDescription: The Film Buff Card can be used to watch movies at cinemas Australia-wide.

results.name: Head to Toe Hottie
results.description: Hot damn, glam is good. So if you’ve got a friend who would love a little tjuz, then look no further. They say, beauty is in the eye of the beholder - of this gift card.
results.retailersDescription: The Head to Toe Hottie Card can be used at hair & beauty retailers Australia-wide.

results.name: Sporty Star
results.description: If they love to hit the gym, the track, or the yoga mat, give them a gift without breaking a sweat - the gift card for activewear. Now, let’s see you work it, baby. Yeah!
results.retailersDescription: The Sporty Star Card can be used at sporting retailers Australia-wide.

results.name: Style Setter
results.description: For the friend who’s the peak of chic. They’ll be ready to hit the runway with this gift card that is all about fashion, darling, faaaaashion.
results.retailersDescription: The Style Setter Card can be used at fashion retailers Australia-wide.

results.name: Tech Head
results.description: You don’t need an algorithm to tell you your friend loves the latest tech. Put a little something-something towards their next smart buy at tech stores.
results.retailersDescription: The Tech Head Card can be used at music, sound & screen retailers Australia-wide.
